description_long: This is a hard-shell black briefcase with a rectangular form and rounded edges, designed for secure transport of personal or professional items. The exterior is smooth and glossy, featuring subtle horizontal ridges for added structural integrity and visual interest. A sturdy, molded handle is integrated at the top, allowing for comfortable carrying. The briefcase opens along a central seam, revealing a foam-padded interior with a checkered texture for cushioning and protection of contents. A small paper or cloth item is visible inside, suggesting the case's use for document or item storage. The closure mechanism appears to be a pair of red-accented latches, providing secure fastening.
description: A glossy black hard-shell briefcase with a molded handle, horizontal ridges, and red-accented latches, featuring a foam-padded interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed briefcase with its molded handle and horizontal ridges clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the briefcase partially open, revealing the foam-padded interior and a small paper or cloth item inside.
description_view_2: Open view displaying the full interior with checkered foam padding and the item inside, as well as the red-accented latches.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view highlighting the thickness of the case and the open lid, with the handle and latches visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single molded plastic handle, rectangular with rounded edges, fixed and integrated into the top shell.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two red-accented latches located at the top edge, likely snap or press-to-release type.
